creator: i@levsha.me
text:
Ivan Klymenko wrote:
...
> error build a package, because not found:
> include/qnp.h
> lib/libqnp.prl

This is not a port bug. Problem found only on 9-HEAD and bug is on bsd
tar in current: see message with subject 'bin/tar incorrectly parse
'[^...]' patterns in --exclude' freebsd-current@
As result string 
--exclude '${DISTNAME}/extensions/nsplugin/src/[^q]*'
from Makefile works incorrect

--
